children.text: in determining eligibility for retirement other than by reason of a physical disability incurred while on active duty as a member of the program; or
in computing years of service creditable under .section 205 of title 37

children.label: B
children.text: completes the active duty obligation imposed under ; andsection 2123(a) of this title

children.label: C
children.text: possesses a specialty designated by the Secretary concerned as critically needed in wartime.

Service credited under paragraph (1) counts only for the award of retirement points for computation of years of service under and for computation of retired pay under .section 12732 of this titlesection 12733 of this title

The number of points credited to a member under paragraph (1) for a year of participation in a course of study is 50. The points shall be credited to the member for one of the years of that participation at the end of each year after the completion of the course of study that the member serves in the Selected Reserve and is credited under with at least 50 points. The points credited for the participation shall be recorded in the member’s records as having been earned in the year of the participation in the course of study.section 12732(a)(2) of this title
Service may not be counted under paragraph (1) for more than four years of participation in a course of study as a member of the program.
A member of the Selected Reserve may be considered to be in an active status while pursuing a course of study under this subchapter only for purposes of sections 12732(a) and 12733(3) of this title.
A member is not entitled to any retroactive award of, or increase in, pay or allowances under title 37 by reason of an award of service credit under paragraph (1).
